issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving double tasks in post-referral and pre-referral workflows
issues.desc: HAs and TCs were receiving duplicate tasks for Loan Simple leads across multiple workflows including pre-referral and post-referral. The issue was traced to a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed the fix.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually dismiss or reconcile the extra duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs continued to receive post-referral workflow check-in tasks even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow filters were not properly excluding these terminal deal stages. Madelaine tweaked the filters on March 9 to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any lingering check-in tasks on deals already marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: LO change not reflected in automated agent emails — old LO still shown
issues.desc: When a loan officer was updated on a deal, the automated emails to the agent continued to display the previous LO's information instead of the new one. The affected deal showed Paul instead of the updated LO Julie Yocum. Luis investigated and resolved the issue on the same day it was reported.
issues.workaround: For deals where an LO change occurred during the impact window, manually verify and resend the agent introduction email with the correct LO information.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-enrolling deals that previously exited and returned to Offer Accepted
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, then reverted to a prior stage, and then set back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger on the second transition. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was missing from the re-enrollment criteria. Madelaine updated the re-enrollment criteria to include this trigger.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted a second time during the impact window to ensure TCs receive their tasks.

issues.title: MRC deals marked Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow, leaving TCs without tasks to manage the closing process. HAs were sending required emails manually as a result. Madelaine spoke with HubSpot support and confirmed the issue was fixed on April 1.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals that were moved to Offer Accepted between approximately March 14 and April 1 to ensure TCs receive the appropriate closing tasks.
